title: stylosanthes erecta var. guineensis
intro: Stylosanthes erecta var. guineensis, also known as Guinea Stylo, is a perennial legume plant native to tropical Africa. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and roots, which have been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The health benefits of Guinea Stylo include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of digestive issues and promote wound healing. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion by boiling its leaves and roots in water to create herbal remedies.
